summary: Great audience recording captures a stellar Friday‑the‑13th show highlighted by an epic Eyes of the World and a wild China Cat Sunflower bridge.
review: ColdRain108 raves about this 1983 Friday‑the‑13th performance, calling it "great, great" with a favorite version of Eyes of the World and a “goes nuts” China Rider (China Cat Sunflower) bridge. The audience tape is praised for its clean sound—no distortion on the bomb‑drop sections that plague other recordings—making the musical magic easy to hear.

ai_rating.rationale: The review is extremely positive (5 stars) and highlights both an outstanding performance and a clean, distortion‑free recording, warranting a high rating despite only one source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, distortion‑free tape; captures the ambience without the bomb‑drop muddiness found in other versions.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The second set is described as a space‑ship landing scene with an uninterrupted flow that ends without an encore, creating a satisfying arc.

band_member_comments.Phil: His Q6 bass work is highlighted as shaking the universe during the show.
